meta.description: UX/UI designer from Tucumán with experience in 3D, branding and product design. Check out my projects and how to work with me.

hero.title: Purposeful UX/UI design and clean code
hero.subtitle: I'm Lucas Ruiz Díaz, a graphic designer and frontend developer based in Tucumán, Argentina. I design accessible web platforms, identity systems and digital experiences with a focus on detail and performance.
